Uses of Interface
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api.Advisor

Packages that use Advisor
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.chat.cache.semantic
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.client
Chat client API.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor
Provides classes for advising chat clients.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api
Provides the API for chat client advisors.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.toolsearch
Tool Search Tool Advisor package for dynamic tool discovery and search capabilities.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore
Spring AI chat client advisors package.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.observation
Provides classes for observing chat data.
org.springframework.ai.rag.advisor
 
org.springframework.ai.test.chat.client.advisor
Test support classes for ChatClient advisor integration tests.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SemanticCacheAdvisor
    An advisor implementation that provides semantic caching capabilities for chat responses.

  • Uses of Advisor in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor

    Classes in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor that implement Advisor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ChatModelCallAdvisor
    A CallAdvisor that uses a ChatModel to generate a response.
    final class 
    ChatModelStreamAdvisor
    A StreamAdvisor that uses a ChatModel to generate a streaming response.
    final class 
    MessageChatMemoryAdvisor
    Memory is retrieved added as a collection of messages to the prompt
    class 
    SafeGuardAdvisor
    An advisor that blocks the call to the model provider if the user input contains any of the sensitive words.
    class 
    SimpleLoggerAdvisor
    A simple logger advisor that logs the request and response messages.
    final class 
    StructuredOutputValidationAdvisor
    Advisor that validates the structured JSON output of a chat client response against a JSON schema derived from the configured output type or a pre-supplied schema string.
    class 
    ToolCallAdvisor
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    since 2.0.0 in favor of ToolCallingAdvisor.
    class 
    ToolCallingAdvisor
    Recursive Advisor that disables the internal tool execution flow and instead implements the tool calling loop as part of the advisor chain.
    Methods in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor with parameters of type Advisor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DefaultAroundAdvisorChain.Builder
    DefaultAroundAdvisorChain.Builder.push(Advisor advisor)
     
    Method parameters in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor with type arguments of type Advisor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DefaultAroundAdvisorChain.Builder
    DefaultAroundAdvisorChain.Builder.pushAll(List<? extends Advisor> advisors)
     

  • Uses of Advisor in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api

    Subinterfaces of Advisor in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    BaseAdvisor
    Base advisor that implements common aspects of the CallAdvisor and StreamAdvisor, reducing the boilerplate code needed to implement an advisor.
    interface 
    BaseChatMemoryAdvisor
    Base interface for chat memory advisors.
    interface 
    CallAdvisor
    Advisor for execution flows ultimately resulting in a call to an AI model
    interface 
    MemoryAdvisor
    Marker interface for advisors that own the memory lifecycle.
    interface 
    StreamAdvisor
    Advisor for execution flows ultimately resulting in a streaming call to an AI model.
    interface 
    ToolAdvisor
    Marker interface for advisors that own the tool-call lifecycle.
    Methods in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api with parameters of type Advisor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    B
    BaseAdvisorChain.Builder.push(Advisor advisor)
    Adds a single Advisor to the chain.
    Method parameters in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api with type arguments of type Advisor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    B
    BaseAdvisorChain.Builder.pushAll(List<? extends Advisor> advisors)
    Adds multiple Advisor instances to the chain.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ToolSearchToolCallingAdvisor
    CallAdvisor that integrates a tool search mechanism into the tool calling workflow.

  • Uses of Advisor in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore

    Classes in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore that implement Advisor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    QuestionAnswerAdvisor
    Context for the question is retrieved from a Vector Store and added to the prompt's user text.
    final class 
    VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor
    Memory is retrieved from a VectorStore added into the prompt's system text.

  • Uses of Advisor in org.springframework.ai.rag.advisor

    Classes in org.springframework.ai.rag.advisor that implement Advisor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    RetrievalAugmentationAdvisor
    Advisor that implements common Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) flows using the building blocks defined in the org.springframework.ai.rag package and following the Modular RAG Architecture.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static class 
    AbstractToolCallingAdvisorAutoRegistrationIT.ChainIterationCountingAdvisor
    Counts how many times the advisor chain passes through this advisor.
